description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.2 Docker image to build the Jekyll site defined by the provided configuration. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build_site job that caches the bundler directory vendor/bundle, runs `bundle install --path vendor/bundle` then `jekyll build -d public`, and stores the public/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the public artifact, publishes it to GitLab Pages, and only runs on the main branch. Set the variable JEKYLL_ENV=production for the build.
